home.subtitle: Import your GPX trace, connect Garmin, and get a segment-by-segment simulation of your next race. Pace, heart rate, energy, fatigue — everything is calculated.
home.feature3: Fatigue model calibrated on your data
home.gpxAnalysisDesc: Import your GPX file — the engine automatically splits the course into segments by terrain type (flat, uphill, downhill), calculates grades, distances and elevation, and generates the interactive elevation profile.
home.dataImportDesc: Import your FIT files from Garmin or add sessions manually to calibrate your profile.
home.simulationDesc: The engine simulates your race segment by segment: pace adjusted by grade (Minetti model), progressive fatigue, estimated heart rate and energy consumption.
home.visualization3dDesc: Visualize your route in 3D with relief exaggeration, terrain type coloring, and interactive rotation. The elevation profile accompanies each analysis.
home.runnerProfileDesc: Automatic calibration from your history: lactate threshold, HR zones, running economy, marathon prediction (Riegel), strengths and weaknesses detected.
home.ctaReady: Ready to analyze your next race?
home.footerDesc: Analysis and simulation tool for trail running. Import your data, calibrate your profile, simulate your races.

planner.dropHint: Drag your GPX trace here to start analysis and generate your race plan.

profile.notEnoughSessions: Not enough flat sessions (10-120 min) to estimate
profile.addSessionsForInsights: Add sessions to generate personalized insights.
profile.economyImproved: Your running economy improved by {{value}}% — you run faster for the same cardiac effort.
profile.paceProgression: Average pace progression of {{value}}% over your last 3 runs vs previous 3.
profile.paceDecline: Pace slightly declining ({{value}}%) — consider adding more recovery.
profile.volumeIncrease: Volume up {{value}}% — good ramp-up, watch for overload.
profile.stablePerformance: Stable performances over your recent sessions. Average pace: {{pace}}/km.
profile.recentAvgPace: Recent average pace: {{pace}}/km over {{count}} recorded sessions.

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Sign in to save your data, sync your runner profile and retrieve your GPX files.
account.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your registration, then sign in.
account.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
account.localDataKept: Your local data will be kept.

premium.loggedIn: Garmin Connect sync is reserved for Premium accounts.
premium.loggedOut: Sign in with a Premium account to sync your Garmin activities.

garmin.title: Garmin Connect
garmin.disconnectedDesc: Raw data + Running Power + Cadence + HRM-Pro
garmin.securityNote: Your credentials are sent to your personal Vercel instance only. OAuth tokens are stored securely on your account.
garmin.mfaTitle: Enter the code already received by email
garmin.mfaDesc: Garmin sent you a code to {{email}} during the first attempt. Enter that same code — don't wait for a new one.

analysis.invertedYAxis: Inverted Y axis: a lower value = a faster pace
analysis.noStreamsData: Not enough GPS streams for the speed/grade curve

gpxImport.mustBeGpx: The file must be in .gpx format
